dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage or heal your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain 3% of your health back.

issues: Equip bonus description mismatch: screenshot reads 'When you use a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage.' but DB stores 'When you deal damage with a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage.'

dbEquipBonuses.name: Focused Daily
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, your next encounter power will deal 20% more damage. (10 second cooldown) Additionally, when Focused Daily triggers, you gain 2.5% Critical Severity for 10s.
